_comment: Gold for ex1. With SIZE=160 the no-overlap boundary slices exactly one of the 9 answer strings; a 40-char overlap heals it; section-based keeps all 9. The exact split count can shift if the corpus text is edited — re-run to confirm.
teaching_point: overlap >= no-overlap; section-based = 9/9 but produces uneven, sometimes large chunks and a junk leading chunk (the title before the first ## header).
